chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-84 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 20.04.2026. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***************************************** None present for applicant/accused. As per report submitted by Superintendent / Officer Incharge, District Prison and Correctional Facility, Badin the applicant/accused Nasir Mehmood has been acquitted by the Trial Court and released on 21.02.2026. In view of above, the instant Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Ali.
